zh.Horton, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾霍頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Gobion於1282年9月29日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾霍頓時，她的父親Sir Richard Gobion III38歲，母親Margery Gobion17歲。她於1301年1月3日之前與Ralph le Boteler結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1360年1月25日享年77歲。

zh-hans.Horton, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾霍頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Gobion于1282年9月29日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾霍頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard Gobion III38岁，母亲Margery Gobion17岁。她于1301年1月3日之前与Ralph le Boteler结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1360年1月25日享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gobion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Bhola, Boodram, Mohan, Narine, Parmanand, Pooran, Shiva.  French Andre, Marcelle, Pierre.
French: from a pet form of   Gobert  .

variants.name: Gobert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Antoine, Marie-France, Monique.

French, German, and English (London): from a medieval personal name, Godebert, composed of the ancient Germanic elements gōd ‘good’ or god, got ‘god’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was popularized in England by the Normans, and probably absorbed an Old English form Godbeorht.

variants.name: Goben
meanings: Altered form of Gobin , a surname of English or French origin. In some cases however, the surname Goben (possibly of German origin; see 2 below) was changed to Gobin.
German (Göben): habitational name from Gobbin on Rügen Island (Pomerania) or perhaps from any of several places called Goben in Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Gobion was born on 29 September 1282, in Horton, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Gobion III, was 38 and her mother, Margery Gobion, was 17. She married Ralph le Boteler before 3 January 1301. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 25 January 1360, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Gobion est née le 29 septembre 1282, à Horton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Gobion III, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margery Gobion, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph le Boteler avant 3 janvier 1301. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 25 janvier 1360, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Gobion am 29. September 1282 in Horton, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Gobion III 38 und ihre Mutter Margery Gobion 17. Sie hat vor 3. Januar 1301 Ralph le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 25. Januar 1360 im Alter von 77 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Gobion è nata il il 29 settembre 1282 nel Horton, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Gobion III, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Margery Gobion, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Ralph le Boteler prima del 3 gennaio 1301. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 25 gennaio 1360, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.Horton, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアホールトン
ja.lifeSummary: Hawise Gobionが1282年9月29日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアホールトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Gobion IIIは38歳，母Margery Gobionは17歳であった。1301年1月3日以前にRalph le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1360年1月25日に77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Gobion(이)가 1282년 9월 29일 영국 노르섬프토실르 호르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Gobion III(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Gobion(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1301년 1월 3일 이전 Ralph le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 1월 25일 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.29 September 1282–25 January 1360: 1282 оны Есдүгээр сарын 29–1360 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 25

pt.29 September 1282–25 January 1360: 29 de setembro de 1282–25 de janeiro de 1360
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Gobion nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1282, em Horton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Gobion III, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margery Gobion, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph le Boteler antes 3 de janeiro de 1301. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1360, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Gobion родилась 29 сентября 1282 г. в местности хауртон, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Gobion III было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Gobion, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph le Boteler перед 3 январь 1301 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 25 января 1360 г. в возрасте 77 лет.

es.29 September 1282–25 January 1360: 29 de septiembre de 1282–25 de enero de 1360
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise Gobion nació el 29 de septiembre de 1282, en Horton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Gobion III, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margery Gobion, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Ralph le Boteler antes de 3 de enero de 1301. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 25 de enero de 1360, a la edad de 77 años.
